summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Onspotly landing page new features. All backend APIs working correctly with new city and device_type fields. Both forms (Shooter and Waitlist) have proper Terms checkbox validation. Animated thank you message displays correctly on waitlist submission. Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and 404 pages load correctly with expected content.
passed_tests: POST /api/waitlist - creates waitlist entry with name, email, city (200)
GET /api/waitlist/count - returns count of waitlist entries (200)
POST /api/shooter-apply - creates shooter application with NEW city and device_type fields (200)
Device types iPhone 13, iPhone 15 Pro Max, iPhone 16e all accepted
Frontend /become-shooter: All fields present (name, email, phone, city, portfolio, device_type, experience, terms)
Frontend /become-shooter: Terms checkbox validation working - shows toast error if not checked
Frontend /become-shooter: Form submission success shows 'Application Submitted!' message
Frontend /become-shooter: Terms and Privacy links navigate to correct pages
Frontend /join: All fields present (name, email, city, terms)
Frontend /join: Terms checkbox validation working - shows toast error if not checked
Frontend /join: Animated thank you message with 'Thank You for Joining Onspotly!' text displays after submission
Frontend /terms: Terms of Service page loads with 11 sections and full content
Frontend /privacy: Privacy Policy page loads with 10 sections and full content
Frontend /some-random-page: 404 page displays with '404', 'Page Not Found', and 'Back to Home' button
Frontend: 404 'Back to Home' button navigates to homepage
Navigation: All main pages load correctly (/, /how-it-works, /features, /pricing, /cities, /become-shooter, /join)
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix in MongoDB during pytest runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) Shooter form now has City and Device Type (iPhone 13-16e) fields, 2) Both forms have Terms checkbox that blocks submission if not checked, 3) Waitlist shows animated 'Thank You for Joining Onspotly!' message after submission, 4) Terms of Service page at /terms has 11 sections, 5) Privacy Policy page at /privacy has 10 sections, 6) 404 page with animation at catch-all route. Note: Airtable sync for shooter may fail if City and Device Type columns not added to Airtable, but MongoDB saves work correctly.
